_comment: Copy this file to ~/.copilot/tangent/config.json and edit. All fields are optional.
_copilotCommand: Override how tangent launches Copilot CLI. Either a string ('agency.exe copilot') or an array (['agency.exe','copilot']). Highest priority after explicit --launcher arg and $env:TANGENT_COPILOT_CMD.
_worktreeRoot: Where new tangent worktrees live. Defaults to $env:LOCALAPPDATA\tangent\worktrees. Overridden by $env:WORKTREE_ROOT.
_autodetectLauncher: If true, walk parent processes via WMI to find agency.exe (or $env:TANGENT_LAUNCHER_HINT). Default: true. Set to false to skip autodetection.
_launcherHint: Optional process name (without path) to look for in parent process chain. Default: agency.exe.
